README!!: Allegro right hand. Each `link_X.0_tip` is a small stub already positioned at the actual fingertip (parent joint origin xyz=(0,0,0.0387) for fingers / (0,0,0.0543) for thumb). center_offset is fine-tuning of ~2mm past the link origin to land on the fingertip pad surface (= same world direction for all fingers). The tip-link visual mesh (`link_tip.obj`) at xyz=(0,0,-0.012) sits behind the link origin (toward the palm side).
name: allegro_right

fingertip_link.name: index
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.0, along local +Z (tip-link local +Z = world -X = the 'past fingertip' direction)

fingertip_link.name: middle
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.0, along local +Z (same convention as index)

fingertip_link.name: ring
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.0, along local +Z (same convention as index)

fingertip_link.name: thumb
fingertip_link._offset_note: magnitude 0.0, along local +X (URDF parent joint_12.0 has rpy=(0,-1.658,-1.5708) which rotates the thumb tip-link's local frame ~90 deg; the world direction toward the fingertip lands on local +X for thumb instead of local +Z for the other fingers — same physical convention, expressed in the rotated local axes)
